nation: Conseil des Montagnais de Unamen Shipu
one_time_description: Redressement sur exercice antérieur lié à des ajustements de revenus de subventions antérieurs en lien avec des dettes non encaissées inscrites aux livres et autres ajustements SAC/SCHL
economic_notes: Six commercial entities held: Corporation de développement économique de Unamen Shipu (100%), Voyages Inter-Nations et Associés inc. (33.33%), Pêcheries Unamen Shipu s.e.c. (51%), Pourvoirie Étamamiou inc. (100%), Société Mukutan inc. (100%), Les Pêcheries Amik Unamen (50%). Two lawsuits from air transport providers. Health centre previously under court-appointed administrator until March 2019.
notes: Qualified audit opinion (opinion avec réserve) due to: (1) Les Pêcheries Amik Unamen financial statements not available - investment carried at $980,141 using modified consolidation method; (2) Centre de santé Unamen Shipu balance sheet items not audited as no accountant produced audited statements from April 1, 2020. Prior year also had qualified opinion. Prior year audited by predecessor auditor. Large prior period adjustment of -$1,542,435 recorded in 2020. Six GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Fiscal year 2020 but audit report dated February 15, 2022 - significant delay. Revenue detailed breakdown not available in extracted text - only totals by fund provided. Remuneration schedules referenced at pages 198 and 200 but not included in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
